meaning: n.眼镜蛇(亚洲南部及非洲所产的一种毒蛇,长约四英尺,怒时头颈能胀大如帽状)
examples: The cobra is one of the world's deadliest snakes.
However, it was not a full "cobra" meeting and no ministers attended.
They ignored the obvious signs of his divinity, such as the cobra that had cradled him at birth or his ability .

At the time, she didn't sign up for COBRA, a decision she now seriously regrets.
